VIDEO 2

Mini Sales Letters Turmeric

6





99 Yr Old Yogi From India Reveals Her Secret To Living “Pain-Free”



Vinda Patel from India is one of the oldest Yoga teachers alive



At 99 years old, she can perform the toughest yoga poses with ease



How does she stay so flexible without stiffness or pain?



In a recent interview, she shared her secret:

“It is truly a blessing that I can stay so loose and “pain-free” at 99 years old” “I credit this all to something I call my “Golden

Life Staple”... thank god I found it.”



“The story of how I discovered this secret is near and dear to my heart, and now I want to share it with you”



At 58 years old, Vinda had a terrible accident that left her bed-ridden for months



She broke her neck, both of her legs, and hurt her back badly...



She survived, but doctors said she’d never be able to do yoga again....

When Vinda’s bones finally healed the lingering pain never went away…. “When I had my accident, I thought I’d never do yoga again” “Even though I healed, my joints were always in pain, and

I was totally stiff. It hurt to even walk up the stairs.”



“But I was determined to find something that could help me, at all costs”



She needed to find something that could relieve her pain, and give her back

her life



At first, she found small relief with modern drugs like ibuprofen…









But soon, she refused to use them…



“Doctors told me if I kept using NSAIDS for my pain, I risked kidney and liver failure”



“Since I value my body’s health more than anything, I stopped using them”



No other remedies doctors suggested seemed to work at all..,



Vinda knew she needed to find a powerful natural remedy better than ibuprofen without the risky side effects...



She walked her small Indian town in pain, speaking to farmers, storeowners,

and more…



She was looking for a glimmer of hope that someone may know how to help

her…



Still, not one person knew what to tell her



Finally, by a stroke of luck, she met someone that would save her life…. In a small town close to hers, she ran into a traditional Indian Healer…

The rumor was that he had successfully helped over 100,000 people with his

remedies…



He looked like he was in a rush to leave town, but Vinda grabbed him just in

time…



Vinda quickly told him about her tragedy and how her pain had never gone

away…



She said she would try anything if it meant it she could have her pain-free life back



She just needed to get to the root of her problem. Why was her pain not

going away?









Here’s what the healer told her:



“The reason for ongoing pain usually ties back

to one thing – chronic inflammation”



“Now, chronic inflammation is mainly caused by

one thing I call the “pain protein””



“Its called NF-kB, and over-production of this “pain-protein” can cause chronic, burning inflammation and pain”



He told Vinda that the key to relieving her pain would be to inhibit this protein



Thankfully, he had just the thing for that…



The healer said, there was one “natural remedy” that would solve her

problem…



It was natural and it would bring soothing relief, and most likely give her life back



He said the remedy is usually extremely expensive…



Yet, he gave it to her at a steep discount, because he felt for her pain She agreed, so he made the remedy for her from scratch

He carefully measured a strange golden powder… And he mixed it with what looked like a black spice… Then, the healer gave her instructions:

“Take a two pinches of this mixture, twice a day with breakfast” “Keep doing this once a day, and report back in 7 days”

In desperation, Vinda did everything the healer said









After day 1 of using the remedy, Vinda was already in awe



She could already feel her stiff, burning joints loosen up and feel much better And after 7 days, Vinda nervously tried to do something crazy…

She attempted to do one of her favorite yoga poses, and she succeeded.



She cried tears of joy. The stiffness, the join pain – it was all gone!



“The remedy worked better than ibuprofen for

my inflammation, I was amazed”



“The best part is, its natural. I did not have to

worry about the risky side effects”



What was this “miracle powder” that the healer had given her?



Vinda caught up with the healer after 7 days, as he requested



She asked him what the secret remedy was, she needed to make it herself!



The healer shared with her the secret:



“I call the golden powder Haldi. also known as Turmeric”



“The one I use is a special type with 95% curcumin, the active ingredient that makes it work so well”



“Also, my mixture includes a rare black pepper extract. This increases absorption by 2000x, and without it, it will not work”



For Vinda to find the right ingredients in a mixture that would work well…



Would have cost her hundreds of dollars and would’ve taken hours each week



The premium Turmeric that the healer used, and the black pepper extract





are not easy to come by…



Thankfully, she stumbled upon a small USA company that also knew the

healer’s secret…



The company was developing a cost effective way to deliver this remedy to

anyone who wants it



They developed a capsule that includes the same ingredients the healer gave Vinda



And all you need to do is take two capsules once a day with breakfast, like the healer instructed Vinda



To experience the same benefits that she did.



Its called “Max Absorption Turmeric with BioPerine®”



This world-class solution is made with 1300mg of 100% organic turmeric.



It even includes the “black spice” the healer mentioned in the form of patented BioPerine®



This combination together, offers a natural remedy that can relieve pain, stiffness, and give you the life you want



The company is so confident in their product that they offer a 6-month 100%

money-back guarantee. No questions asked.



When word of this breakthrough formula got out, demand exploded.



The company sold out for months.



Thankfully, the company got more in stock to start 2019 However, they expect this batch to sell out extremely quickly. And it won’t be until June 2019 when its back in stock.





Due to how hard it is to source this high quality, rare ingredients.



Now, the company is offering a 41% discount to promote natural health



And they set up a special site to for you to claim this discount



Last time we checked, the company only has a couple hundred bottles left

and they are going fast!



The most popular options are a 3 or 6-month supply…



Because it’s the best way to receive ongoing benefits that Vinda did And so that you can stock up before the company sells out…

It’s a no brainer at less than $1.50/day.



Remember, the company has a 6-month money-back guarantee, so this is a 100% risk-free offer.



And just remember, it’s a heck of a lot safer than mainstream remedies like ibuprofen
